Tournament work

Trackmania

Competitive map design for organized Trackmania events, built in collaboration with Waypoint Mapping.

TM Games — Global competition

ALTIUS — Team USA

Built for TM Games, a global Trackmania competition modeled after the Olympics. Represented the United States alongside several teammates, with each map serving as a competitive event category.

Represented USA Global event Team entry

Out of the Blue — Tournament

Low Earth Orbit

Designed and built for Out of the Blue, a Trackmania tournament with a $15,000+ prize pool. Created in collaboration with a teammate from Waypoint Mapping.
